channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: New Measures to Combat Illegal Tourist Rentals in Ibiza
item.description: Ibiza authorities announce a new step in the fight against illegal tourist rentals, streamlining inspections and penalties through data integration.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Meta, Apple Face Modest Fines for Alleged DMA Breaches - TechRadar Pro
item.description: The European Union's Digital Markets Act (DMA) could see Meta and Apple facing fines for alleged breaches, but it's believed that the EU may prioritize compliance over hefty penalties.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Cancer Treatment Breakthrough: USC Study Reveals Gene Mutations Key to Personalized Care
item.description: A landmark study from the University of Southern California could hold the key to improving the efficacy of cancer treatment. Researchers found over 700 genetic alterations that directly impacted survival rates and created an AI tool to predict lung cancer patient responses to immunotherapy.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
